growth_theory.value: Pentagonal Strategy centered on five pillars (growth, employment, equity, efficiency, sustainability) with infrastructure and digital technology as enabling priorities for structural transformation to high-income status.

source.quote: my government is committed to taking transformative actions through our recently launched Pentagonal Strategy for Cambodia's socio-economic development over the next 25 years…the five key priorities are people, roads, water, electricity and technology, especially digital technology.

risk_tolerance.value: Moderate risk appetite signaled through commitment to transformative structural actions and reliance on regional trade integration (RCEP, bilateral FTAs) as growth catalysts.

source.quote: my government is committed to taking transformative actions…The RCEP, along with other bilateral FTAs, has not only given a boost to the kingdom's sustainable trade growth but also become a magnet to attract more foreign direct investments.

time_horizon.value: Dual long-term horizon (2050 high-income target, 25-year strategy) with intermediate milestones (2027 developing-country graduation, 2030 upper-middle-income status).

source.quote: Cambodia has set a strategy to transform it into a high-income country by 2050…upper-middle-income country by 2030 and a resilient, vibrant and prosperous high-income country by 2050…Pentagonal Strategy for Cambodia's socio-economic development over the next 25 years.

dependency_assumptions.value: Heavy reliance on regional trade agreements (RCEP, China FTA, Korea FTA) and foreign direct investment as primary growth engines; vulnerability to regional economic cycles implicit.

source.quote: The RCEP agreement, the Cambodia-China Free Trade Agreement, and the Cambodia-Republic of Korea Free Trade Agreement will help Cambodia graduate from its least developed country status…The RCEP, along with other bilateral FTAs, has not only given a boost to the kingdom's sustainable trade growth but also become a magnet to attract more foreign direct investments.

institution_vs_relationship.value: Mixed mode: reliance on formal multilateral institutions (UNGA, World Bank classifications, RCEP framework) alongside bilateral relationship-dependent FTAs (China, Korea), suggesting both rules-based and relationship-based strategies.

source.quote: The Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP) agreement, the Cambodia-China Free Trade Agreement, and the Cambodia-Republic of Korea Free Trade Agreement will help Cambodia graduate from its least developed country status.

global_positioning_logic.value: Regional integration through RCEP and Asia-Pacific trade architecture; alignment with China and South Korea as bilateral partners; support for UN-based multilateral order (UNGA participation).

source.quote: The RCEP agreement comprises 15 Asia-Pacific countries, including 10 ASEAN member states…and their five trading partners: China, Japan, South Korea, Australia and New Zealand.

consistency_score.value: High consistency between stated long-term goals and revealed funding priorities (infrastructure, digital technology, regional integration); no major contradictions detected in available messaging.

source.quote: the five key priorities are people, roads, water, electricity and technology, especially digital technology…expected to grow 5.6 percent in 2023.
